	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h

	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D46_jump_1B00
fwd_1D46_jump_1B00:
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	add A, R4
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB0

	nop

	rr A
	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h

	nop
jump_1DB0:
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF4
	nop
jump_1DB4:

	ajmp jump_1B00

; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	1DB7h
jump_1DB7:
	nop

	jnz jump_1DBA
jump_1DBA:
